recommendedAction: Coverage matrix marked bank-backed science rows as isGeneratorBacked=false when generatorBacked.bank was set (legacy branch). Phase 4 already resolves science via data/science-questions.js in question-generator-adapters.mjs. Fix: set isGeneratorBacked to "bank" in coverage-matrix build and treat "bank" as generator-backed in coverage catalog.
notes: No new MCQ content was added. Classification change only so matrix-smoke / catalog "covered" can include science cells that the adapter already serves.
